hooks.command:
bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); ACTIVE=$(printf "%s" "$INPUT" | node -e "let d=\"\";process.stdin.on(\"data\",c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on(\"end\",()=>{try{console.log(JSON.parse(d).stop_hook_active||false)}catch{console.log(false)}})" 2>/dev/null || echo false); [ "$ACTIVE" = "true" ] && exit 0; echo "Session end checklist:
- Archive completed projects? (work/active/ -> work/archive/YYYY/)
- Update indexes? (Index.md, Memories.md, People & Context, Brag Doc)
- New notes linked? (orphans are bugs)
- Run /om-vault-audit if many notes were created/modified"'
